title: elyna macrolepis
side_effects: Elyna macrolepis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to stomach problems, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Long-term misuse of Elyna macrolepis has also been linked to kidney damage and liver failure in severe cases. Additionally, improper use of the plant can interact with other medications, exacerbating existing health conditions.
